summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Librarian's Quest mobile game on Expo web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). All 9 review-request flows verified end-to-end: title screen + high score panel, HOW TO PLAY navigation + back, START GAME -> character select, character selection enabling confirm -> /game, game screen with player sprite + score/lives HUD + pause button, tap-to-jump (player Y moved from 932 -> 828 after tap), score increments over time (000000 -> 000006 in 2s), pause overlay with resume + quit-to-menu (resume continues game, quit returns to title). Game-over overlay testIDs (game-over-overlay, retry-game-button, go-home-button, final-score) verified present in /app/frontend/app/game.tsx via code inspection (collisions are RNG-dependent, not forced).

issues: RN-Web deprecation warnings (non-blocking): 'textShadow*' style props deprecated (use 'textShadow'); 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Consider migrating in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx, /app/frontend/app/game.tsx.

react_native_issues.issue: During Expo Router fade animation, two elements with data-testid="title-screen" exist briefly (incoming + outgoing). Tests using exact selector should use .first() or wait for animation. Cosmetic only — actual navigation works correctly (verified via screenshot).

test_report_links: Playwright run executed inline against EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
action_items: (Optional) Replace deprecated textShadow* shorthand props with the new textShadow style on RN-Web to silence console warnings.
(Optional) Replace <View pointerEvents="..."> with style={{ pointerEvents: '...' }} for RN-Web compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: game.tsx is ~617 lines — borderline; consider extracting parallax tile renderer and entity/HUD blocks into separate modules for maintainability.

Game loop uses setInterval at 33ms which is fine for an arcade feel, but per-frame setScore/setFloatTexts/forceRender will cause heavy re-renders; for production polish, batching or requestAnimationFrame on web could be considered.
Score tick logic `Math.floor(scrollX.current) % 10 === 0` can fire multiple frames per tick if speed is fractional — small distance-scoring inconsistency, not a bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile-first Expo Router app at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Mobile viewport 390x844. All testIDs from review request work as documented. Note: Expo Router fade animation keeps both incoming/outgoing screens momentarily — use .first() or wait_for_timeout(600) after navigation. Game loop is setInterval-based ~30fps; allow 1-2s for score progression checks. Collisions are RNG-driven so don't force a game-over via play; game-over overlay can be code-inspected. AsyncStorage key for high score: '@lq_high_score'.
